description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. These blue leather sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans, to shorts and skirts. The leather panels with the cut outs are perfect for everyday wear. Upper Woven leather band on the forefoot Leather heel cup with square perforations for ventillation and added style Elastic band attached to the heel cup for a snug Fit Soft leather lining for added comfort Cushioned footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured pattern on the forefoot and flower heel for better grip Sandal Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight Use a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
